notes: All prompts use the --title bypass so runs are non-interactive and machine-evaluable. Artifact assertions check the canonical run directory ~/.claude-marketing/{brand-slug}/runs/{run_id}/ per the Pipeline Contract in skills/contentforge/SKILL.md. Thresholds referenced from config/scoring-thresholds.json.

evals.name: Full pipeline smoke test (article)
evals.prompt: Write a 2000-word article about sustainable coffee packaging for an eco-friendly coffee brand called GreenBean. --type=article --brand=greenbean --keyword="sustainable coffee packaging" --title="Sustainable Coffee Packaging: What Actually Works"
evals.expected_output: A complete pipeline execution (Step 0.5 + phases 1-8, 10 quality gates) producing a fact-checked, brand-compliant, SEO-optimized article with inline citations and a full checkpoint audit trail

assertions.text: Run directory ~/.claude-marketing/greenbean/runs/{run_id}/ exists and run.json lists completed_phases containing all of: 0.5, 1, 2, 3, 3.5, 4, 5, 6, 6.5, 7, 8 with status 'completed'

Checkpoint artifacts exist per the Pipeline Contract: phase-0.5-title.txt, phase-1-research.md, phase-2-factcheck.md, phase-3-draft.md, phase-3.5-visuals.md, phase-3.5-visual-manifest.json, phase-4-validation.md, phase-5-structured.md, phase-6-seo.md, phase-6-structure-manifest.json, phase-6.5-humanized.md, phase-7-review.json, phase-8-output.json
Phases executed in correct order (Research → Fact Check → Draft → Visual → Validate → Structure → SEO → Humanize → Review → Output) with a [PHASE-AUDIT] line emitted per phase
phase-0.5-title.txt contains exactly the bypassed title 'Sustainable Coffee Packaging: What Actually Works' and no interactive title-option prompt occurred
Output includes inline citations from verified sources with URLs; word count is within ±10% of 2000
SEO keyword placements present: title, first 100 words, ≥2 H2s, conclusion, meta description; meta title and meta description generated
No hallucinated statistics — every data point in the article traces to an entry in phase-2-factcheck.md or phase-4-validation.md
A .docx file exists (run directory and ~/Documents/ContentForge/GreenBean/) containing Appendices A, B, and C

evals.name: Regulated-industry whitepaper (pharma knowledge pack)
evals.prompt: Create a whitepaper on AI-powered clinical trial recruitment for a pharma company. --type=whitepaper --brand=pharmaco --title="AI-Powered Clinical Trial Recruitment: An Evidence Review"
evals.expected_output: A fact-checked whitepaper with pharma industry knowledge pack calibration, domain-specific validation, visual asset annotations, and strict evidence standards

assertions.text: Industry knowledge pack (pharma) is loaded and SME calibration is applied in Phase 3
Domain-specific validation in Phase 4 checks regulatory compliance and terminology accuracy
phase-3.5-visual-manifest.json exists and every chart specification traces to a verified statistic in phase-2-factcheck.md
phase-7-review.json applies the pharma industry threshold override from config/scoring-thresholds.json (not the default pass threshold)
Content uses appropriate pharma terminology without oversimplification

evals.name: BFSI FAQ with compliance and schema rules
evals.prompt: Write an FAQ page about home loan refinancing for a financial services brand. --type=faq --brand=finserve --title="Home Loan Refinancing: Your Questions Answered"
evals.expected_output: A structured FAQ with verified financial data, BFSI knowledge pack calibration, and appropriate disclaimers

assertions.text: BFSI industry knowledge pack is loaded for financial content calibration
Schema markup appropriate to content type is included in SEO output (Article + Organization baseline; FAQPage only because this IS a dedicated FAQ page)
Financial disclaimers are present where required, and word count is within the FAQ range of 600-1200
All interest rates and financial figures cite authoritative sources recorded in phase-2-factcheck.md

evals.name: Phase 7 scoring dimension test
evals.prompt: Create a blog post about remote work productivity tips for brand 'techstartup' (technology industry, conversational tone). --type=blog --brand=techstartup --title="Remote Work Productivity: Tips That Survive Contact With Reality" Verify the Phase 7 scoring output.
evals.expected_output: Phase 7 produces phase-7-review.json with all 5 dimensions scored 1-10, composite score calculated as the weighted average per config/scoring-thresholds.json, and a pass/fail decision

assertions.text: phase-7-review.json exists in the run directory and contains exactly these 5 dimension keys: content_quality, citation_integrity, brand_compliance, seo_performance, readability
Composite score equals the weighted average using the dimension weights in config/scoring-thresholds.json, rounded to 1 decimal
Each dimension score is between 1.0 and 10.0
Decision is APPROVED only if composite meets the pass threshold in config/scoring-thresholds.json AND all dimension minimums are met

evals.name: Empty guardrails compliance test
evals.prompt: Create a blog post about investment strategy basics for a BFSI brand whose profile has EMPTY guardrails (no prohibited_claims, no required_disclaimers). --type=blog --brand=bareinvest --title="Investment Strategy Basics for First-Time Investors" Verify the system warns about missing guardrails.
evals.expected_output: System warns that guardrails are empty for a regulated industry before starting the pipeline. Phase 5 reports compliance as SKIPPED (not PASSED). Phase 7 applies the empty-guardrails penalty per config/scoring-thresholds.json.

assertions.text: Pre-flight validation warns: guardrails empty for regulated industry, and asks before proceeding
Phase 5 brand compliance reports 'skipped_empty_guardrails' status, NOT 'passed'
phase-7-review.json shows the Brand Compliance score includes the empty-guardrails penalty and the run is flagged for manual review
Final output includes guardrails status in the Quality Scorecard / Completion Card

evals.name: Title bypass and brand-personality drafting test
evals.prompt: Create an article about AI in supply chain management for brand 'logicorp' (witty personality, conversational tone, B2B SaaS industry). --type=article --brand=logicorp --title="Your Supply Chain Called. It Wants an AI Copilot." Verify the --title bypass behavior and brand-voice application.
evals.expected_output: The --title bypass skips option generation entirely, checkpoints the supplied title verbatim, and the pipeline applies the witty/conversational brand personality in drafting and humanizing.

assertions.text: No title options are generated and no user selection is requested — Phase 1 starts directly after Step 0 init and the 0.5 checkpoint
phase-0.5-title.txt contains exactly 'Your Supply Chain Called. It Wants an AI Copilot.' (verbatim, unmodified)
Draft and humanized output reflect the witty/conversational brand personality (casual language, clever framing) per the brand profile passed to phases 3 and 6.5
run.json meta captures the run inputs (keyword/audience/word-count/tone where provided) so the run is resumable cross-session
